title: rubus propexus
intro: Rubus propexus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the rose family, characterized by its red, edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant's roots, leaves, and fruits have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, showcasing anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus propexus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for various skin conditions. Rubus propexus can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile addition to various herbal remedies.
